title: Ferro-Fluid Sphere
prompt: Create a self-contained HTML file with an interactive ferro-fluid sphere using Three.js (CDN). The sphere should feel like the Anomaly from No Man's Sky — an otherworldly, living orb suspended in deep space. Icosphere with layered 3D simplex noise displacement, spike-like peaks via power curve, highly reflective dark metallic material with iridescent fresnel edges, mouse-reactive spike attraction, bloom post-processing, chromatic aberration, and film grain.
description: An otherworldly ferro-fluid sphere with simplex noise displacement, iridescent fresnel edges, mouse-reactive spikes, and cinematic post-processing — inspired by No Man's Sky's Anomaly
